summary: M2 evidence repository adapter delivered. EvidenceRepository abstract with three concrete backends (JsonlEvidenceRepository, PostgresEvidenceRepository, DualEvidenceRepository), factory build_repository, RepositorySettings.from_env reading SANGUO_RAG_REPO_MODE / SANGUO_RAG_PG_DSN / SANGUO_RAG_PG_SCHEMA / SANGUO_RAG_LAKE_ROOT / SANGUO_RAG_REPO_DRY_RUN. All writes are idempotent (per-table key + sha256), PostgreSQL upserts use ON CONFLICT, dual mode mirrors without overriding JSONL canonical. 7 smoke tests pass.

artifacts.description: Abstract EvidenceRepository, three concrete backends, RepositorySettings.from_env, RetryPolicy with exponential backoff, per-table idempotent key derivation, JSONB columns coerced via json.dumps before psycopg executemany.
7 tests: jsonl idempotent write, jsonl dry-run no I/O, postgres dry-run write report, postgres requires DSN when live, dual aggregation, factory default, factory rejects unknown mode. All pass.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: state/evidence repository abstraction with jsonl/postgres/dual modes
acceptanceMapping.evidence: EvidenceRepository ABC + JsonlEvidenceRepository + PostgresEvidenceRepository + DualEvidenceRepository + build_repository factory.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: default mode is jsonl; dual only mirrors and does not change canonical JSONL behavior
acceptanceMapping.evidence: RepositorySettings.from_env defaults mode='jsonl'; DualEvidenceRepository calls jsonl first then postgres and merges results so JSONL write semantics are unchanged.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: connection info from env or settings, no DSN/schema/namespace hardcoded
acceptanceMapping.evidence: RepositorySettings.from_env reads SANGUO_RAG_PG_DSN, SANGUO_RAG_PG_SCHEMA, SANGUO_RAG_LAKE_ROOT, SANGUO_RAG_REPO_MODE, SANGUO_RAG_REPO_DRY_RUN.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: idempotent upsert, error ledger, retry/backoff, no-write dry-run
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Per-table idempotent keys; WriteResult.errors captured per attempt; RetryPolicy with sleep_for(attempt) for exponential backoff; dry_run=True writes nothing while still counting.

featureFlags.SANGUO_RAG_PG_DSN: PostgreSQL DSN; required when mode != jsonl and dry_run=False

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0203: backfill runner uses this adapter in postgres mode
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0204: parity gate compares JsonlEvidenceRepository state against PostgresEvidenceRepository state
